Our Story

Passion for crafting, straight from the heart.

How It All Started

"As a kid, I loved to make different things."

That simple joy of creating something from nothing has been the driving force behind Taylor Made Accessories. What started as a childhood hobby of piecing together materials to make small crafts eventually blossomed into a lifelong passion.

Every piece of jewelry, every hand-knit blanket, and every custom coaster set is made with that same childlike wonder and dedication to quality. I believe that the best accessories aren't just worn or used—they're experienced.

Our goal is to bring a little bit of that handmade magic into your everyday life. Whether you're looking for a statement necklace, a cozy blanket for movie nights, or a unique gift for a friend, you'll find something made with love right here.

Shop Our Collection

"Creating beautiful things is more than a business; it's a way of sharing joy with the world."

Our Values

Handcrafted Quality

Every item is carefully made by hand with attention to detail and quality materials.

Made with Love

Passion is poured into every creation, ensuring you receive something truly special.

Terms of Service

Last Updated: June 10, 2026

1. Agreement to Terms

Welcome to Taylor Made Accessories. By accessing our website and purchasing our handcrafted jewelry, custom t-shirts, cozy blankets, or coaster sets, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. Please read them carefully before using our services.

2. Handcrafted & Custom Nature of Products

At Taylor Made Accessories, we pride ourselves on the unique, handcrafted nature of our products. Please note that because every item is individually handmade, there may be minor variations in color, layout, pattern alignment, and details compared to the pictures shown on our website. These small variations are a natural hallmark of artisanal quality and are not considered defects.

3. Ordering, Pricing, and Payments

By placing an order, you agree that all information you provide is accurate and complete. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel any orders, including those with custom size selections or custom team options, at our sole discretion. Prices for all products are subject to change without notice.

4. Shipping & Delivery

We aim to process and ship all orders within 1–2 business days. While we work hard to meet this target, shipping and delivery times are estimates and cannot be guaranteed. Taylor Made Accessories is not responsible for postal carrier delays once the package has left our facility.

5. Return and Refund Policy

Because many of our products are handcrafted or made-to-order (including team-specific accessories), we handle refunds and returns on a case-by-case basis. If you receive a damaged item or have any concerns with your purchase, please contact us via our Contact Page within 14 days of delivery. We will work with you to find a fair solution.

6. Limitation of Liability

To the maximum extent permitted by law, Taylor Made Accessories shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages resulting from the purchase or use of our products, or the inability to use this site.

Privacy Policy

Last Updated: June 10, 2026

1. Information We Collect

We collect personal information that you provide to us directly, including your name, email address, shipping address, and payment card details when you place an order or contact us. This data is collected solely to process and ship your orders.

2. Payment Processing Security

All payments made on our site are processed securely through encrypted third-party payment gateways. We do not store or have direct access to your full credit or debit card numbers on our servers.

3. How We Use Your Information

We use the information we collect to fulfill your orders, provide customer support, communicate updates about your shipment, and—if you opt-in—send you newsletter updates about new drops and sales.

4. Information Sharing and Disclosure

We value your privacy and do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information to third parties. We only share information with trusted third-party service providers (such as shipping carriers and payment processors) strictly to the extent necessary to process and deliver your order.

5. Cookies and Analytics

Our website may use cookies to remember items in your shopping cart, preserve your local application state, and analyze site traffic to improve your overall shopping experience.

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about Taylor Made Accessories

Everything in our catalog is handcrafted with a deep passion for creation. From customized blankets and NFL-themed coaster sets to hand-beaded bracelets and apparel, we offer unique items made with precision and love that you won't find in big box stores.

Yes, absolutely! Because our accessories are 100% handmade, each piece is uniquely yours. Minor variations in bead color alignment, pattern layouts, and wood styling are natural characteristics of handcrafted items and represent their individual beauty rather than a flaw.

We pride ourselves on offering fast and affordable shipping. We aim to process and hand off all packages to the carrier within 1 to 2 business days of your order.

For custom apparel (like our pajamas and t-shirts), you can choose your desired size directly on the details page. For items featuring team options, you can select your favorite NFL team from the dropdown before clicking "Add to Cart".

We handle refunds and returns on a case-by-case basis due to the custom and handcrafted nature of our products. Please submit a request on our Contact Page within 14 days of delivery if your purchase does not meet your expectations.
